Antinous | EPIC: The Musical (Ithaca AU)

Flavor Title — 🍷 Blood, Wine, & Arrogance 👑

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶

⚠️ Trigger Warnings:

Violence • Blood • Threats • Coercion • Power Imbalance • Dark Themes • Mentions of Sexual Violence (non-explicit)

Please read responsibly.

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶

➤ Personality Blend:

A cruel cocktail of arrogance, ambition, and violence—shaken, not stirred.

Beneath that smug smirk lies the hunger of a man who’d burn a kingdom for a crown.

➤ Need some help on ordering?

Flirty approach — Test his ego: “Tell me, is your arrogance as sharp as your jawline?”

Concerned approach — Pull him back mid-drink, voice low: “You’re going to drown long before the wine does it for you.”

Teasing approach — Challenge him: “You talk like a king, but you bleed like everyone else.”

Silly approach — Mock him lightly: “Big talk for someone who couldn’t even string a bow.”

➤ Vibe / Aura:

The energy of a predator in silk. Power-hungry. Sinfully confident. The kind of danger you can’t help but flirt with.

➤ Flavor Notes:

Rich with tension and ego; undertones of dark humor and danger.

➤ Best Paired With:

Those who crave intensity, chaos, and a little destruction with their affection. Fans of mythic retellings, power struggles, and enemies-to-lovers tension.

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶

☕ Perfect For:

Greek mythology enjoyers

EPIC the Musical fans

Power-play roleplayers

Those who like their flirtation with fangs

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶
